patterns.name: meta.tasty-styles.variable.tsx
patterns.comment: Match variables ending with Styles/Tokens, with optional Styles/Tokens type annotation

patterns.name: meta.tasty-styles.typed.tsx
patterns.comment: Match variables with explicit Styles type annotation (e.g., const foo: Styles = { ... })

patterns.name: meta.tasty-styles.tsx
patterns.comment: Only match object properties (styles: { ... }) here. JSX attributes with styles={...} are handled by the inline {{ ... }} rule above. This avoids breaking when styles are set via a predefined object, e.g. styles={styles}.

patterns.name: meta.tasty-states.tsx
patterns.comment: Match states: { ... } inside configure() or tasty() for state alias definitions

jsx-component-style-props.comment: Patterns for style props and regular props inside JSX component tags

patterns.comment: Style prop with string value: gap="2x"
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.string.tasty

patterns.comment: Style prop with object value: gap={{ '': '2x', hovered: '3x' }}
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.object.tasty

patterns.comment: styles/Styles prop with inline object: styles={{...}}, overlayStyles={{...}}
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.styles-object.tasty

patterns.comment: Regular attribute with expression value: onClick={...}
Regular attribute with string value: className="wrapper"

jsx-expression-content.comment: Basic patterns for JSX expression content

patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector keys with double-quoted values: 'theme="danger"':
patterns.name: meta.object-property.attribute-selector.tasty

patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector keys with single-quoted values: 'theme='danger'':
patterns.name: meta.object-property.attribute-selector.tasty

patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector keys with unquoted values: 'theme=danger':
patterns.name: meta.object-property.attribute-selector.tasty

patterns.comment: Complex state expression keys with attribute selectors
patterns.name: meta.object-property.tasty

patterns.comment: Property value continuation for quoted custom properties
patterns.name: meta.object-property.value.custom-property.tasty

patterns.comment: State alias key '@name': followed by state expression value
patterns.name: meta.object-property.state-alias.tasty

tasty-state-expression-string.comment: A quoted string whose content is parsed as a state expression (@root, @media, logical operators, etc.)

patterns.name: variable.other.constant.tasty
patterns.comment: Property name reference $$name → --name (used in transition, will-change)

patterns.name: support.constant.color.tasty-token
patterns.comment: Color property name reference ##name → --name-color (used in transition)

patterns.name: variable.other.constant.tasty
patterns.comment: Custom properties as single tokens: $local-spacing, $theme-color, etc.

patterns.name: support.constant.color.tasty-token
patterns.comment: Color property name reference ##name → --name-color (used in transition, will-change)

patterns.name: support.constant.color.tasty-token.builtin
patterns.comment: Reserved color token #current for currentcolor, with optional opacity

patterns.name: constant.numeric.custom-unit.tasty
patterns.comment: Dynamic custom units: {number}{unitName} where unitName starts with letter (2x, 1.5r, .5x, -.75custom, etc.)

patterns.name: meta.attribute-selector.tasty
patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector with double-quoted value: theme="danger"

patterns.name: meta.attribute-selector.tasty
patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector with single-quoted value: theme='danger'

patterns.name: meta.attribute-selector.tasty
patterns.comment: Simplified attribute selector with unquoted value: theme=danger
CSS pseudo-classes with function notation: :has(), :is(), :where(), :not(), :nth-child(), etc.
patterns.name: meta.pseudo-class-function.css

patterns.comment: CSS pseudo-classes without function notation: :hover, :focus, etc.
patterns.name: meta.pseudo-class.css
meta.attribute-selector.tasty
patterns.comment: Enhanced CSS attribute selectors with proper syntax breakdown

patterns.name: constant.numeric.css-with-unit
patterns.comment: CSS numbers with explicit units (1.5rem, 100%, 2s, etc.)

patterns.name: constant.numeric.css
patterns.comment: Bare numbers without units, including .5 format (after custom units are checked)

patterns.name: keyword.operator.logical.tasty
patterns.comment: Logical operators: AND, OR, XOR, NOT

patterns.name: meta.group.state-logic.tasty
patterns.comment: Recursive grouping for logical expressions to support nested highlighting
Dimension shorthand identifiers: w, h, width, height
patterns.name: support.constant.property-value.tasty

pseudo-class-function-content.comment: Content inside pseudo-class functions like :has(), :is(), :where(), :not(), :nth-child(), etc.

patterns.comment: Numeric values with n: 2n+1, odd, even
patterns.name: constant.numeric.css

style-prop-name-pattern.comment: Style prop names - uses match pattern with lookahead for =

patterns.comment: Style prop name followed by = (for JSX props)
patterns.name: support.type.property-name.tasty

safe-string-value-patterns.comment: Only patterns that won't match plain English text - safe for global injection

patterns.comment: Color token with # prefix like #primary, #dark-02 - only inside quoted strings
String starting with dimension value like 2x, 1r - only inside quoted strings

string-value-patterns.comment: Legacy - patterns for highlighting tasty values

jsx-style-props-injection.comment: Legacy - Direct injection of style prop patterns into JSX tag attributes

patterns.comment: Style prop with double-quoted string value: gap="2x"
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.string.tasty

patterns.comment: Style prop with single-quoted string value: gap='2x'
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.string.tasty

patterns.comment: styles/Styles prop with inline object: styles={{...}}
patterns.name: meta.jsx-style-prop.styles-object.tasty

patterns.comment: Style prop with object value: gap={{ '': '2x', hovered: '3x' }}
